contenu:
Stellantis Connected Vehicle API (1.0.8)
Download OpenAPI specification:Download
E-mail: fca-cloud-api@developers.stellantis.com
Build Applications with Stellantis North America connected Vehicles.
For former PSA groupe vehicles, please visit https://developer.groupe-psa.io/
To view these docs SwaggerUI- https://developers.stellantis.com/apidocs.html
To view these docs ReDoc- https://developers.stellantis.com/docs.html
Get details of account, showing all linked accounts
Get details of account including api key, vehicle accounts, owned VINs, geofence collections, and geofencing subscriptions.
"api_account_owner": "your_email@domain.com",
"first_name": "First Name",
"phone_number": "123-456-7890",
"usage_description": "Usage Description",
"account_status": "APPROVED",
"your_connected_account_email@domain.com":
"geofencing_subscriptions":
Request API Account Credentials for Stellantis Cloud API
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
Credential Request Received
Your registration could not be processed at this time, please try again later
Account request already received for your_email@domain.com. account status is PENDING APPROVAL
"api_account_owner": "your_email@domain.com",
"password": "Your_password!1",
"phone_number": "+12484250000",
"address": "1000 Chrysler Drive, Auburn Hills, MI, 48306",
"usage_description": "Briefly describe your use case, purpose for requesting access to the API"
"result": "Your account request has been received. You will receive a response via email to the address specified."
Link an API account to you Connected Vehicle account
Associate a Stellantis API Account to an existing Jeep, Maserati, Ram, Chrysler, Dodge Connect, Sirius XM Guardian, or Mopar.com connected vehicle account. One API account can be linked to many connected vehicle accounts. Connected vehicle account credentials must be valid and cannot be managed with this API. Your connected vehicle account must be enrolled and have eligible VINs. If subscriptions on an existing VIN are added to or removed from a connected vehicle account, call this API to refresh the linked account.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
connected_account_password
"connected_account_email": "your_connected_account_email@domain.com",
"connected_account_password": "your_connected_account_password"
"result": "Account Link Success",
"connected_account_email": "your_connected_account_email@domain.com",
Unlink / Remove Connected Vehicle account from API account
This API reverses the action of /link. VINs associated with the vehicle account being unlinked are removed from your Stellantis API account
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
"connected_account_email": "your_connected_account_email@domain.com"
"result": "Account Removal Success",
"connected_account_email": "your_connected_account_email@domain.com"
Update API account password
Update API account password - this API must be called to set a permanent password after registration or a forgotten password reset using /resetpassword
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
"api_account_owner": "your_api_account@email.com",
"current-password": "Your_Current_PW!1",
"password": "Your_New_PW!1"
"message": "New Password Set"
Reset account password/forgotten password. This API will send a temporary to account email. Note, you must use /setpassword to set a permanent password after using this API
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
"api_account_owner": "your_api_account_email@domain.com"
"message": "Your password has been reset, a temporary password has been sent to your_email@domain.com"
Permanently Delete API account
This API permanently deletes the API acount. Note that this request cannot be undone. To create a new account use /v1/account/register
"result": "Your account - your_email@domain.com - Has been deleted"
Retrieve a bearer token with API credentials
Retrieve a bearer token with API credentials
user name provided in api credentials
password provided in api credentials
Invalid username or password
"access_token": "eyJraWQiOiJyc2ExIiwiYWxnIjoiUlMyNTYifQ.eyJzdWIiOiJhY2JjY2Q...",
sends remote commands to vehicle
Remote commands for vehicle. Available commands are START, remote start CANCEL, UNLOCK, LOCK, or HORNS & LIGHTS
Vehicle Identification Number
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
Command successfully sent to service delivery platform
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
retrieves array of recent data sensor values
Gets vehicle data as an array. Timestamps are based on time collected on vehicle. Sensor array provided for up to last 8 hrs.
Vehicle Identification Number
data successfully retrieved
"app_timestamp": "2021-10-31 21:59:06.000",
"data": "{\"Speedometer\": \"15.0\", \"PowerMode\": \"4\", \"PresentGear\": \"2\",\"SteeringWheelAngle\": \"-6.0\"}"
retrieves last known data sensor values for a vehicle
Gets vehicle data for a provided sensor. Provides most recent sensor value.
Vehicle Identification Number
data successfully retrieved
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"data": "{\"vin\": \"3D7UT2CL0BG625027\", \"value\": \"12532\", \"signal\": \"odometer\", \"timestamp\": \"2020-02-22 19:53:41.071\"}"
Submit general feedback, questions, comments to Stellantis.
Submit general feedback, questions, comments to Stellantis. For bug report, use /bugs
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
"feedback-content": "Enter your feedback here."
"result": "Feedback received. Thank you."
Submit Bug Report. For General feedback or questions, use /feedback instead
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
"feedback-content": "Enter a detailed description of the issue."
"result": "Bug report received. Thank you."
Get details of all breach events.
Get details of all breach events for vins and geofence collections owned by the user. This data includes the time, breach type (ENTER or EXIT), geofence collection name, geofence ID, Latitude, and Longitude.
Create geofence collection
Create a geofence collection by providing fields named collection_name and entries. The geofence collection geometry may be one of Polygon or Circle.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
Data about the geofence collection name and points.
CreateGeofenceCollectionResponse
"collection_name": "collection_name",
"Geofence collection (collection_name) created successfully."
Batch put geofence in collection
Add one or more geofences to an already created geofence collection.
Name of geofence collection
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
Geofences to add to the geofence collection. The geofence geometry may be Polygon or Circle.
/v1/geofence-collection/{collection}/batch-put-geofence
"Successfully added geofence(s) to geofence collection (collection_name)."
Remove one or more geofences from the geofence collection by providing the IDs os the geofences.
The geofence collection name
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
List of geofences to remove from geofence collection.
BatchDeleteGeofenceResponse
/v1/geofence-collection/{collection}/batch-delete-geofence
"Successfully deleted geofence(s) from geofence collection (collection_name)."
Delete geofence collection
Delete a geofence collection permenantly.
The geofence collection name
/v1/geofence-collection/{collection}/delete
"Successfully deleted geofence collection (geofence_collection)."
Create a subscription for a vin and a geofence collection.
Create a subscription for a vin and its movements in relation to geofences of a collection. Once the subscription is created, you may add subscribers to receive notifications about breach events to those endpoints.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
VIN and geofence collection name.
CreateGeofencingSubscriptionExistsResponse
CreateGeofencingSubscriptionResponse
/v1/geofencing-notifications/subscription
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name"
"This subscription already exists."
Retrieve subscription information for a vin and a geofence collection.
Retrieve all information about a particular subscription that tracks movements of a vehicle in relation to a geofence collection.
GetGeofencingSubscriptionResponse
/v1/geofencing-notifications/subscription
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name",
"notifications_enabled": true,
"HU_vin_for_popup": "3D7UT2CL0BG625054",
"phone_number_subscriptions":
Delete geofencing subscription for a vin and a geofence collection.
Delete a geofencing subscription. This action stops the tracking of a vehicle's movements in and out of a geofence collection.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
VIN and geofence collection name.
DeleteGeofencingSubscriptionResponse
/v1/geofencing-notifications/subscription
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name"
"Success! Subscription for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name deleted successfully."
Get details of all subscriptions
Get details ofsubscriptions for your vehicle(s) and geofence collections.
/v1/geofencing-notifications/subscriptions
Enable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection.
Enable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection for all existing subscribers.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
VIN and geofence collection name.
EnableGeofencingNotificationsResponse
/v1/geofencing-notifications/enable
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name"
"Success! Notifications for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name are enabled."
Disable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection.
Disable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection for all existing subscribers.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
VIN and geofence collection name.
DisableGeofencingNotificationsResponse
/v1/geofencing-notifications/disable
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name"
"Success! Notifications for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection are disabled."
Subscribe to geofencing notifications for a VIN and geofence collection.
Subscribe endpoints such as phone numbers, email addresses, and head unit VINs to geofencing notifications. Subscribed head unit VINs will receive in-vehicle popups with geofence breach information.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
VIN, geofence collection, and endoints that subscribe to the geofencing notifications.
/v1/geofencing-notifications/subscribe
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name",
"HU_vin_for_popup": "3D7UT2CL0BG625054",
"Success! Subscriptions to vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name breach event added successfully."
Unsubscribe from geofencing notifications for a VIN and geofence collection.
Unsubscribe endpoints such as phone numbers, email addresses, and head unit VINs from geofencing notifications.
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
VIN, geofence collection, and endoints to unsubscribe from the geofencing notifications.
/v1/geofencing-notifications/unsubscribe
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027",
"collection_name": "collection_name",
"HU_vin_for_popup": "3D7UT2CL0BG625054",
"Success! Subscriptions to vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name breach event removed successfully."
Define endpoints for where VIN streaming information should be sent to.
Vehicle Identification Number
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
AddStreamingEndpointsResponse
"Successfully added streaming endpoints for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027)."
Retrieve streaming endpoints for the vin's data
Retrieve a list of all endpoints where a VIN data in being streamed to.
Vehicle Identification Number
GetVINStreamingEndpointsResponse
"vin": "3D7UT2CL0BG625027"
Delete information about the VIN streaming endpoints.
Remove information about the VIN streaming endpoints. By performing this action, any endpoints previously defined will no longer retrieve streaming information about the VIN.
Vehicle Identification Number
DeleteVINStreamingInfoResponse
"Successfully deleted streaming info for the vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027)."
Removes an endpoint from the list of endpoints where stream data for the VIN is sent to.
Removes an endpoint for the vin data streaming.
Vehicle Identification Number
REQUEST BODY SCHEMA: application/json
Command successfully sent to service delivery platform
"endpoint": "STREAMING_ENDPOINT_1"
"Streaming endpoint (STREAMING_ENDPOINT_1) successfully removed for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027)."
